title: Command 17007-ES Broom Gripper, 2 Adhesive Strips, Suitable for storing brooms and mops up to 1.8 kg (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Ideal for storing brooms and mops neatly and tidily
Damage-free hanging, holds strongly and removes cleanly
Easy to apply, no need for nails, screws or drills
Strips stretch off cleanly without leaving holes, marks or sticky residue
Suitable for most smooth surfaces including painted walls, tiles, metal and wood
Pack contents: 1 broom gripper and 2 large strips
See usage instructions. Not suitable for unpainted paper or vinyl wallpaper

We recommending using water-resistant Command Bath Products, which are made specifically to hold in humid and wet environments. Usage Tips Wait 7 days after painting before use.
